global.description: The ad features a vibrant design promoting the game NeonArena with engaging visuals and clear calls to action.
global.main_message: Compete in NeonArena and earn rewards for new players.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: NeonArena logo
elements.description: A stylized logo featuring the text 'NeonArena' in bold, vibrant colors, positioned at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Game icons
elements.description: Four circular game icons with a minimalistic design, arranged in a grid format at the top center of the ad.

elements.label: Gameplay preview
elements.description: A visual representation of gameplay, showcasing interactive elements in a vibrant, engaging style, located in the center.

elements.label: Game interaction
elements.description: An interactive gameplay scene with colorful graphics and dynamic elements, positioned below the app screenshot.

elements.label: Background shapes
elements.description: Geometric shapes in a light green background, adding depth and interest to the ad's design.

elements.label: Unknown element
elements.description: A small, unclear element at the top right, possibly a decorative feature or icon.

elements.label: Unknown element
elements.description: A small, unclear element positioned near the top center, possibly a decorative feature.

elements.label: Unknown element
elements.description: A small, unclear element positioned in the center, possibly a decorative feature.

elements.label: Unknown element
elements.description: A small, unclear element positioned near the top left, possibly a decorative feature.

elements.label: Unknown element
elements.description: A small, unclear element positioned in the center left, possibly a decorative feature.

elements.label: Main headline
elements.description: The bold headline 'Beat your rivals' in a prominent font, centrally located to attract attention.

elements.label: Supporting text
elements.description: The text 'Free rewards for new players' in a smaller font, positioned below the headline to provide additional information.
elements.text_content: Beat your rivals Free rewards for new players

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: The button 'Start now' in a bold, inviting font, located at the bottom of the ad to encourage user interaction.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, playable, bright and playful, NeonArena logo, engaging gameplay visuals, clear call to action.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, followed by game icons, gameplay preview, supporting text, and the call to action at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: NeonArena, Beat your rivals, Free rewards for new players, Start now
